CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 219 At 09:00 Am On April 14, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-15-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Catherine Ann Robertson, Esq. Steve Capper was sworn and examined on behalf of the plaintiff. The Court receives evidence and good cause appearing, grants judgment as follows: Principal: $45,614.68, Fees: $10,147.90, Interest: $5,181.55 Costs: $245.00 for a total judgment of $61,189.13. Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2003 Continued To Jun-13-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
